title: helianthus debilis var. tardiflorus
intro: Helianthus debilis var. tardiflorus, also known as the American sunflower or beach sunflower, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Helianthus debilis var. tardiflorus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
